Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, elevated creatinine suggesting impaired renal function, and significant proteinuria, glycosuria, ketonuria, and bilirubinuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, and has low specific gravity. These findings indicate possible acute or chronic kidney dysfunction, likely with tubular involvement, and possible hepatic or hemolytic component. Recommend further nephrological and hepatological evaluation.
